name: Agfunder
description: Operator of an investment company intended for founders who are transforming food and agriculture. The company invests in entrepreneurs who are aiming to build the next generation of great agriculture and food technology companies, enabling founders and startups to raise funds for the business.

name: Cheddar Up
description: Developer of an online payment platform designed to collect and track online group payments. The company's platform offers services including online payment tracking, automatic reminders, no fees for the collector, and custom form fields services, besides providing a user interface that makes collecting online payments accessible to anyone, enabling users to create custom online payment pages for almost anything and save time and focus on more important activities.

name: HODL Media
description: Developer of a crypto market data application designed to track cryptocurrency prices and charts from all exchanges. The company's application offers real-time charts, prices, and information from all global exchanges along with filtered tweets and headlines from news sources, enabling users to have clarity about the cryptocurrency scenario in the financial market.

name: Innovaccer
description: Developer of a data activation platform designed to assist healthcare organizations to activate their data silos. The company's platform aggregates analyzes and activates patient data, enabling healthcare organizations to have patient insights right in the moment of care and offer each patient private, customized care with suitable plans, a dedicated team, and outcome-focused goals.

name: Linte
description: Developer of cloud-based legal software designed to provide document management. The company's software offers to create, manage, and automate documents and legal contracts, enabling legal professionals to gain total control over a contract life cycle.

name: Rhythmos
description: Developer of an algorithmic system intended to optimize the entire electric mobility ecosystem. The company's algorithmic optimization system (AOS) platform uses advanced machine learning and data analytics to optimize grid performance, considering fleet owner operational requirements, existing utility tariffs and rates, electric utility infrastructure capacity and grid constraints, wholesale energy market pricing, and more, enabling clients the transition to a decarbonized power grid based on distributed energy resources as primary service providers.

name: Speedlancer
description: Developer of a freelance job connectivity platform designed to hire skilled professionals. The company's web-based platform helps job seekers deliver allotted tasks within the specified period of time, enabling startup founders, digital agencies, SMBs, marketers and enterprises to get their work done and freelancers to get quality working experience.

name: Six Deg
description: Developer of a social learning platform designed to promote and improve peer learning outcomes for students. The company's platform forms a social layer on top of existing enterprise learning systems to build engaging learning experiences privately and securely and helps to turn their classroom into a collaborative learning community, enabling institutions and universities to increase students' knowledge of current affairs and increase engagement and retention.

name: Hexa
description: Provider of an online sales platform designed to automate the menial tasks of sales reps through a single operator. The company's online sales platform is designed to increase the output of sales tools and processes to enables true personalization at scale and free up sales representatives' time.

name: Backlotcars
description: Provider of a subscription based online wholesale marketplace for the wholesale auto industry designed to make buying wholesale easy, transparent and enjoyable. The company's wholesale marketplace provides direct access to true wholesale inventory from new car stores, enabling car dealers, auto finance companies and rental car companies to liquidate inventory direct to their end-market without having to go to physical auctions.

name: DCHQ
description: Developer of a deployment automation and governance platform for container-based applications. The company provides a platform that enables users to model, deploy, backup, update and monitor container-based applications.
